ot_description: Kicked off the Offboarding module: wrote the requirements and per-feature design specs, then built the Resignation Request end to end — the V93 migration, entities and a full state-machine service on the Spring Boot backend, plus the employee and HR screens with RTK Query on the frontend. Added hierarchy-scoped visibility so managers see only their direct reports, applied V93 locally, and refined the submit form and status timeline.

tasks.name: Offboarding Module — Requirements & Design Specs
tasks.body: Offboarding module requirements and detailed design specs (resignation, exit settlement, letters, DB migration)
tasks.summary:
- Explored backend + frontend codebase to ground the Offboarding module design
- Wrote master requirements doc and per-feature design specs: Resignation Request, Exit Settlement (workflow-based, no salary system), Experience Letter, Relieving Letter
- Authored consolidated DB migration spec with a won't-break-existing-flows analysis
- Cross-linked all specs from the master index

tasks.name: Resignation Request — Backend (Spring Boot)
tasks.body: Implemented resignation backend: V93 migration, entities, repos, DTOs, service, controller
tasks.summary:
- Wrote V93 Flyway migration (employee_exits, notice_period_configs + role seeds, users override column)
- Added ExitReason/ExitStatus enums + resignation NotificationType values
- Built EmployeeExit & NoticePeriodConfig entities, repositories, request/response DTOs
- Implemented ResignationService (role-based notice resolution, full state machine, in-app notifications) + ResignationController; compiled BUILD SUCCESS

tasks.name: Resignation Request — Frontend (React Native/Expo)
tasks.body: Implemented resignation frontend: RTK Query API, employee + HR screens, navigation
tasks.summary:
- Built resignationApi.ts (12 RTK Query hooks) + added Resignation cache tag
- Created MyResignationScreen (employee: submit modal + status tracker) and OffboardingScreen (HR list + detail/accept/reject/complete modals)
- Wired navigation (types, DrawerNavigator) and role-gated sidebar items
- Typecheck clean — no new errors

tasks.name: Resignation — Hierarchy-Scoped Visibility & Manager Permissions
tasks.body: Row-level scoped visibility; managers see their team and acknowledge only
tasks.summary:
- Added viewer-scoped list query + per-row access checks (admin/HR see all; managers see only their direct reports' plain-employee resignations)
- Elevated-role resignations restricted to admin/super-admin/HR
- Set manager permission to Acknowledge-only (Accept/Reject/Complete restricted to admin/HR) in backend @PreAuthorize and frontend button gating

tasks.name: Local DB Setup & V93 Migration
tasks.body: Applied V93 to local monarch-portal-stage and repointed start-local.ps1 to local DB
tasks.summary:
- Diagnosed deployed-vs-dev migration lineage gap; numbered migration V93 above the deployed max
- Applied and verified V93 on the local monarch-portal-stage DB (tables + seeds + column)
- Repointed start-local.ps1 backend to the local DB via env-var datasource override (fixed an auth-failure)

tasks.name: Resignation UI Refinements & Card Mockups
tasks.body: Date-picker default, tenure/notice-given fields, connected timeline, card design variants
tasks.summary:
- Fixed submit date picker to pre-fill the earliest allowed day so the calendar opens on a selectable month
- Added Tenure and Notice Given to the Offboarding detail modal and My Resignation card
- Rebuilt the status timeline as a connected vertical timeline
- Produced 4 HTML status-card design variants for review
